question: Given v6a's result (stable training but amorphous blobs from a too-weak discriminator), what architectural and methodological approach should v7 take to achieve coherent 3D structures?

project_state.status_snapshot: Phase 4.6. VQ-VAE v16b is stable and passes all reconstruction targets. Diffusion prior v6a trained with joint adversarial discriminator — training was stable but generated samples are amorphous blobs. The discriminator was too weak to provide meaningful gradient signal. The 8x8x8 latent space has 512 positions with 256-dim embeddings from the VQ-VAE codebook (4096 codes).

metrics.vq_vae_recon: v16b passes all targets: voxel accuracy 97.2%, block-type F1 0.94, structural skeleton preserved
metrics.v6a_training: Stable training, val loss converged to 0.305, but all generated samples are amorphous blobs
metrics.adversarial_history: v2: adversarial collapse (discriminator won immediately). v5: adversarial degenerate (D accuracy stuck at 50%). v6a: too-weak discriminator (blobs)

project_state.version_history: v1: mode collapse (single repeated output) → v2: adversarial collapse (D won, G produced noise) → v3: empty outputs (wrong loss weighting) → v4: incoherent (better but still not recognizable structures) → v5: degenerate (adversarial D stuck at 50% accuracy) → v6a: amorphous blobs (stable training, weak discriminator)

confounds_discovered_later: No VQ-VAE structural coherence diagnostic had ever been run — 6 versions built without verifying latent space preserves structural properties (ground contact, connectivity), not just block accuracy
good_references: Adversarial training has failed 3 times (v2, v5, v6a) — pattern of repeated failure
Dataset is only 3,500 samples — data augmentation via 3D rotations can 4x this at zero cost
failed_approaches_to_avoid: Joint adversarial training / GAN discriminator (failed 3 times: v2, v5, v6a)
ground_truth.actual_decision: Phased: (A) Run VQ-VAE structural diagnostic first, (B) MSE-only + rotation augmentation + self-conditioning for v7, (C) Post-hoc discriminator guidance at inference (not joint training)
ground_truth.actual_outcome: VQ-VAE diagnostic PASSED (density r=0.98, vertical r=0.99, support r=0.88). v7 trained per plan but still produced blobs, leading to further investigation.
